fields.name: client_logo
fields.guidance: Footer/master logo: PNG path for the client's logo — swapped everywhere this slot appears. Leave unset to keep the neutral CLIENT LOGO chip.

fields.name: client_logo_cover
fields.guidance: Cover logo lockup: PNG path for the client's logo — swapped everywhere this slot appears. Leave unset to keep the neutral CLIENT LOGO chip.

fields.name: client_logo_light
fields.guidance: Logo on light backgrounds: PNG path for the client's logo — swapped everywhere this slot appears. Leave unset to keep the neutral CLIENT LOGO chip.
